ran_on: openevolve unlimited A10G (no PPL, no bench-quota)
_schema_note: LIVE oracle readout. per_position_cumulative_accept[d] = MARGINAL P(committed path reaches >= depth d). E[T] = 1 (bonus) + sum(cumulative). This is the CUMULATIVE form (chain-identity reconstruct), distinct from the synthetic self-test sample which stores per-position CONDITIONAL q_spine. depth1_spine_accept is the depth-1 top-1 spine match (tree-attn-free / linear-identical forward).

bugs_live.BUG_1_spine_depth1: 0.679 < 0.7287 fp32 target (denken #133 lane: positions / fused spec metadata / drafter conditioning at depth-1)
bugs_live.BUG_2_salvage_no_descend: E[T]=2.621 below even the 3.844 linear-MTP floor; salvage fires (391) + eager-correct (full=37) but does not descend (wirbel lane)

oracle_read: the bug is at depth-1 (spine top-1), NOT the star-attn verify (which works). Make depth-1 spine byte-identical to linear first; salvage is then additive on top.
discrepancy_note: chiku-inu's separate probe (board 20260614-104247-994) reports depth1_accept=0.591 / tok/step=2.07 for the same tree-488-pw-fp32-v0; openevolve's A10G oracle (this file, the PR-authoritative source) reports 0.679 / 2.621. Both agree qualitatively: fp32 did NOT fix BUG-1; as-built FAILS 500 (official 214-271). The both-bugs-fixed conclusion is invariant to which readout is canonical.
